violations.text: Employee observed rinsing utensils in the hand-washing sink. A hand-washing sink must not be used for purposes other than hand washing. New Violation. Correct By: 07/14/2025

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (veggie slicer, ice machine) were observed with an accumulation of black/brown residue, food, and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Veggie slicer cleaned and sanitized during inspection. Ice machine is being cleaned and sanitized as well. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/14/2025

Quaternary ammonium sanitizer buckets were stored with food, equipment, utensils, or single service items. Chemicals must be stored to prevent the contamination of clean equipment, utensils linens, and/or single service by spacing or partitioning and locating them in an area that is not above or next to food, equipment utensils, linens, and single service articles. New Violation. Correct By: 07/14/2025

Proper cooling methods were not used for time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods. Potatoes for potato skins were placed in the walk-in cooler in a covered container greater than four inches deep. Potato skins were actively cooling and in proper temperature range (39 - 48 degrees F). Potatoes must be placed in an uncovered, shallow/flat container when cooling. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/14/2025

The doors to the outside, located in receiving and at the entrance, are not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. Doors were being repaired at the time of inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 07/14/2025
Utensils were observed stored in stagnant water between uses. Between uses utensils must be stored in a clean, dry location. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/14/2025

Individual cutting boards and cutting boards of the prep units are very scratched and scored. Cutting blocks and boards that are subject to scratching and scoring shall be resurfaced if they can no longer be effectively cleaned and sanitized, or discarded if they are not capable of being resurfaced. New Violation. Correct By: 07/31/2025

Shelving throughout the kitchen observed lined with aluminum foil. Aluminum foil is not smooth, durable, and easily cleanable. Aluminum foil is to be removed. Shelf liners must be smooth, durable, and easily cleanable. New Violation. Correct By: 07/14/2025

The receiving door located in the back of the kitchen and the front door, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. Establishment must repair doors. New Violation. Correct By: 08/13/2024
Walk-in refrigerator door gaskets were observed in poor repair. Establishments must replace gaskets. New Violation. Correct By: 09/06/2024

The cutting boards in the prep area are very scratched and scored. Cutting blocks and boards that are subject to scratching and scoring shall be resurfaced if they can no longer be effectively cleaned and sanitized, or discarded if they are not capable of being resurfaced. New Violation. Correct By: 09/06/2024
The 3-bay sink faucet was observed in poor repair. Equipment is to be in good repair and proper adjustment. Establishment is to repair faucet. New Violation. Correct By: 08/20/2024

Shelves observed to be covered with aluminum foil. Aluminum foil is not durable and easily cleanable. Aluminum foil was removed at the time of inspection. Shelves can be covered using material that is smooth, durable, and easily cleanable. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 08/06/2024

The non-food contact surfaces of the ice machine have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. Non-food contact surfaces must be cleaned to sight and touch. New Violation. Correct By: 08/07/2024
